title: Voters wary of government ownership in companies as Trump administration takes equity stakes
summary: About half of voters believe it isn't appropriate for the U.S. government to own stakes in companies, a new CNBC poll found.

title: Bezos backs CuspAI as startup teams up with Nvidia to hunt for chipmaking materials
summary: CuspAI is part of a new wave of companies looking to use AI to solve challenges in the physical world.

title: China's Zhongji Innolight sees shares surge after Hong Kong listing approval
summary: The deal size will exceed Luxshare Precision's $3.1 billion IPO earlier this month, making it the largest listing in Hong Kong this ​year.
